2024 Land Rover Discovery 4 SDV6 Vogue (Highest Spec),Changes this year include the availability of a 493-horsepower V8 for both the 110 and the 130, along with new standard features. These include a panoramic moonroof, adaptive cruise control, fog lights, a 10-speaker Meridian audio, and a heated steering wheel that are now standard. The upgrades are nice, but the biggest news is the new V8 engine option. We spent a week with it in X-Dynamic SE trim, to see how it does as a family hauler and adventurer.
